# Stockfish.js License Notice

This directory contains Stockfish.js WASM files vendored from:
- **npm package**: stockfish (version 18.0.7)
- **Source**: https://github.com/nmrugg/stockfish.js
- **License**: GPLv3
- **Purpose**: Chess engine for position evaluation and playing against user

The Stockfish chess engine is licensed under the GNU General Public License version 3 (GPLv3).
See https://github.com/official-stockfish/Stockfish/blob/master/Copying.txt for full license text.

Files:
- stockfish-18-lite-single.js - Worker loader script (~20 KB)
- stockfish-18-lite-single.wasm - Single-threaded WASM binary (~7 MB)
